description_long: This is a rugged, industrial-style portable work lantern featuring a cylindrical metal cage that protects the light source. The lantern has a robust orange handle with a built-in switch and a long, coiled orange power cord ending in a two-prong plug, indicating it is electrically powered. The upper section is encased in a metallic, likely steel, housing with a protective wire guard and a hook for hanging. The glass enclosure is partially visible, shaped cylindrically, and is shielded by the metal cage. The design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and safety for use in garages, workshops, or construction sites. There are no decorative elements, and the overall appearance is functional and practical.
description: A heavy-duty portable work lantern with a metal cage, orange handle, and long power cord, designed for rugged environments. It features a cylindrical glass enclosure and a hanging hook.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal cage, orange handle with switch, and the coiled power cord with plug.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wire guard, hanging hook, and the profile of the cylindrical enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back of the lantern, handle, and the full length of the power cord.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wire guard, coiled cord, and the hook from a different angle.
